name: researchwiki
description: ResearchWiki — living research journal with mechanical fact extraction. Eight skills (init, log, sync, deepscan, lint, query, recall, fix-stale) that maintain a wiki layer (interpretation), an index layer (facts), and an optional deep layer (knowledge graph) alongside research code, under strict P3 (propose-don't-mutate) and P8 (analysis-not-speculation) discipline.
